menuItems.name: Signature Espresso
menuItems.description: Single-origin, medium roast with notes of caramel and dark chocolate. The perfect foundation for any coffee experience.

menuItems.name: Cold Brew Meditation
menuItems.description: Smooth, naturally sweet cold brew served over ice. Brewed for 24 hours for a mellow, refined taste.

menuItems.name: Golden Turmeric Latte
menuItems.description: Anti-inflammatory turmeric blended with warm milk, cardamom, and honey. Wellness in every sip.

menuItems.name: Matcha Whisper
menuItems.description: Premium ceremonial matcha whisked with steamed milk. Vibrant green, earthy, and delightfully smooth.

menuItems.name: Smoked Salmon Toast
menuItems.description: Artisan sourdough, cream cheese, capers, and premium smoked salmon. A light, elegant brunch choice.

menuItems.name: Roasted Vegetable Bowl
menuItems.description: Seasonal roasted vegetables, quinoa, tahini dressing. Hearty, nourishing, and Instagram-worthy.

menuItems.name: Butter Croissant
menuItems.description: Flaky, buttery layers made fresh daily. The Parisian classic that never disappoints.

menuItems.name: House-made Tiramisu
menuItems.description: Layers of espresso-soaked ladyfinger, mascarpone cream, and cocoa dust. A timeless Italian masterpiece.
